title: foundation — canonical ULID prefix registry
description: Authoritative mapping of every ULID prefix used in Academorix. A prefix is a short (3–4 char) semantic tag preceding the 26-char base32 ULID body, forming a primary key like `plt_01HXYZ...` (TenantLocale). The pattern is enforced by every model's `keyPrefix` in x-eloquent + the corresponding JSON Schema `pattern` in properties. Every prefix must be UNIQUE across the platform; this file is the source of truth. Prefix rules: 3–4 lowercase letters + trailing underscore, ASCII only, no vowel-only sequences that read as English words (avoid `and_`, `for_`, `not_` is intentional).

constraints.reservation_convention: First-registered wins. Renames require this registry to be updated in the SAME commit as the schema changes.

aac_.description: Registry entry for an action decorated with #[AsApprovableAction]. Populated by boot-time discovery.

abs_.description: Per-athlete-per-session absence record. status IN (unexcused / excused / no_show_advance_notice_given / vacation / medical / bereavement). Auto-created by ReconcileAttendanceJob for missed sessions (no matching AttendanceRecord). Guardian/athlete may self-report absence in advance (auto-excused per policy). Admin can excuse post-facto (flip counted_toward_freeze=false + re-run CheckAbsenceFreezeThresholdJob). N unexcused past threshold triggers membership freeze via cascade. Composite unique (tenant_id, session_id, athlete_id) partial — mutually exclusive with AttendanceRecord for same (session, athlete). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToSession + BelongsToAthlete + BelongsToAthleteEnrollment + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

acg_.description: Short-lived (300s) cross-Application SSO grant token. Consumed atomically at exchange.

aen_.description: Roster attachment binding an Athlete to a Team + Season. Atomic conversion creates a teams::TeamMember in the same DB transaction on status → active. age_group_snapshot_id frozen at enrollment for birthday-drift isolation.

aev_.description: 24-hour TTL email verification token. Hashed at rest.

age_.description: Age-bucket classifier (U6/U8/…/U18/Adult/Senior/Masters) for athlete-team eligibility. Sport-agnostic at the base; sport-specific overrides via sport_key. Cutoff kinds: calendar_year / academic_year / rolling_from_birthday / custom_date. Every tenant gets a default 10-entry catalog on TenantProvisioned.

agr_.description: Per-resource dynamic access grant. Polymorphic subject + resource, JSONB permissions, decision enum (allow/deny - deny wins).

agu_.description: Parent / legal-guardian pivot binding an Athlete to a User. Exactly one is_primary=true per Athlete when any exists. Four role flags (has_legal_custody, can_pickup, can_receive_communications, can_authorise_medical_care). Verification workflow with auto/hr/silent paths.

aid_.description: Identity resolution table. Maps anonymous_id (uuid, browser/device generated on first visit) → identified_user_id as soon as the user identifies. device_fingerprint_hash (SHA-256) — NEVER raw fingerprint. Used ONLY for anti-abuse (coordinated signup detection). merged_from array preserves alias merge trail. 1-year retention post-identify per GDPR minimisation.

ajd_.description: Revoked jti with natural expiry. Populated by password-change / user-suspend / breach-response flows.

ajk_.description: HS256 signing key with per-Application binding + kid rotation. Secret KMS-envelope-encrypted at rest.

amc_.description: Auth-side pending MFA challenge ledger row. Shared with mfa module (mfc_ is mfa's alias for the same shape).

and_.description: Per-provider-per-attempt delivery log. One row per (event × provider × attempt). Contains request payload, provider response, HTTP status, latency, and (on failure) error details + next_retry_at. 90-day retention — debugging window past which provider-side dashboards are authoritative. batch_id links deliveries flushed in a single batch job.

ane_.description: Canonical behavioral event ledger. One row per business event captured. Immutable after terminal status (delivered / partially_delivered / suppressed_by_consent / suppressed_by_sampling / suppressed_by_provider_off). Snapshots attribution + consent + context at CREATE time (frozen). Server-side authoritative for events browsers drop to ad-blockers + iOS ITP. Consent-gated on `analytics` category (distinct from marketing). 2-year retention (5-year with analytics_extended_retention).

apc_.description: Per-tenant provider configuration. Encrypted config jsonb (API keys, project IDs, host URLs). enabled_event_types + sampling_rate + batch_config filter which events fan out. Circuit-breaker state (5-strike / 60s window / half-open probe). Seven providers: posthog, amplitude, mixpanel, segment, june, google_analytics_4 (analytics catalog, distinct from marketing), custom_webhook.

apd_.description: Individual approve/reject decision by an approver. Write-once - no update, no delete.

apg_.description: Approver group within a template. Ordered via sort_order for sequential + parallel semantics. Quorum type all/any/n_of_m.

api_.description: One row per triggered approval flow. Polymorphic subject; immutable-once-created except for lifecycle status transitions.

apn_.description: Per-approver reminder audit row. De-duplicated via composite unique on (requirement, approver, reminder_number).

apo_.description: Per-branch or per-membership-plan attendance rules. grace_period_minutes for late arrivals (15 default), late_after_minutes penalty threshold (30 default), late_arrival_penalty_type IN (none / consume_pass_anyway / fractional_pass_consume / notify_only), no_show_fee_cents (nullable), max_unexcused_absences_per_period + absence_freeze_period_days for enrollment freeze cascade, auto_excuse_reasons jsonb, notification_config jsonb. Composite unique (tenant_id, branch_id, membership_plan_id) partial WHERE is_active = true. Policy resolution: (branch, plan) → (branch, null) → (null, null) tenant default. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToBranch (nullable) + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

app_.description: Product container. One or more tenants belong to an Application.

apr_.description: Per-approver-group requirement materialised at instance-create time. Snapshotted selector + resolved_approvers (delegation-aware).

apt_.description: Tenant-authored approval rule set (runtime data per D-A4). Versioned; multiple templates per action_key with priority-ordered match.

arp_.description: Per-tenant retention policy override for the audit lane. Enterprise-only (audit_retention_extended entitlement). retention_years 1..10; override_reason free-text ≥ 20 chars for compliance-officer justification; override_starts_at + optional override_ends_at time bounds. Partial unique index (tenant_id) WHERE deleted_at IS NULL — one active policy per tenant. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasUserstamps + Auditable + IsRetentionAware + SoftDeletes.

art_.description: Per-tenant, per-log_name retention policy override for the activity lane. Enterprise entitlement activity_retention_extended gates the write path. retention_days 30..730; override_reason free-text ≥ 20 chars; optional expires_at wall-clock reversion. Distinct from arp_ (AuditRetentionPolicy) — activity feeds the tenant UX vs audit's regulator feed. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasUserstamps + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

atd_.description: Per-athlete-per-session check-in event. status IN (present / late / left_early / present_with_note / not_yet_checked_in). checked_in_via IN (self_kiosk / coach_verified / admin_recorded / geofence / qr_scan). Atomically consumes finance::Pass via Pass.consume() in same DB txn when session.requires_pass. Composite unique (tenant_id, session_id, athlete_id) partial — one record per athlete per session. Late arrivals also create a LateArrival satellite. Deletion refunds the consumed pass. Fires load-bearing AttendanceRecorded event that cascades to growth::analytics + notifications. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToSession + BelongsToAthlete + BelongsToAthleteEnrollment + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

ath_.description: The person being coached. Belongs to Tenant + Branch + optional User. Snapshot demographic + medical (REGULATED_HEALTH) + emergency contact (CONFIDENTIAL) profile with 7-year retention + 90-day post-archive redaction. Consent snapshot per GDPR Art. 8 for minors.

atp_.description: Append-only touchpoint ledger. One row per attribution-bearing HTTP request. NEVER mutated after commit (except metadata jsonb). NO SoftDeletes — hard-delete only via retention purge, reset audit hold, or TenantErased cascade. Denormalised subject_type + subject_id for direct index-driven queries.

atr_.description: Refresh token in the rotation-with-reuse-detection chain. Polymorphic tokenable, family_id for lockdown cascade.

att_.description: Per-subject rolling attribution profile. Polymorphic subject (user / athlete / lead / anonymous_session). First-touch fields IMMUTABLE post-create. Lifecycle: anonymous → identified → converted → churned. Consent-gated at capture (marketing category). Cascades through tenant_id only — NEVER carries application_id / region_id / organization_id / branch_id / scope_node_id.

aud_.description: Compliance-grade audit entry with cryptographic hash chain.

bkg_.description: Timed reservation against a Facility. State machine: pending → confirmed → completed/cancelled/no_show. Overlap detection under SERIALIZABLE isolation.

brd_.description: Theme + logo profile per Tenant. Extracted from tenants at v0.3.

brn_.description: Physical venue where Organization + Region axes meet. Carries tenant_id + organization_id + region_id. FK-central: every downstream domain aggregate (facility, team, staff, coach, athlete, membership) references branches.id.

bst_.description: Catalogue entry driving per-tenant defaults (features, terminology, seeded roles). Dual-source — code-primary via BusinessTypeEnum + DB mirror in business_types for admin UI + tenant customs (per .kiro/steering/enum-db-seed-dual-source.md).

cas_.description: Many-to-many pivot Coach ↔ Session/Team/Event with role. role IN (head_coach / assistant_coach / observer / substitute). start_date + optional end_date bounds. Enforces one head_coach per (assignable_type, assignable_id) via partial unique. Polymorphic assignable (Session / Team / Event) validated same-tenant by observer. NotifyAssignmentEndingSoonJob fires 7d before end_date. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToCoachingProfile + MorphTo(assignable) + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

cat_.description: Module-fed category registry row (platform default when tenant_id=null, tenant override otherwise).

cbk_.description: Bank-forced money-out. Complementary to Refund (merchant-initiated). Escalated from PaymentDispute (pdi_) on payment::PaymentDisputeLost, or filed directly via provider webhook. State machine: pending_evidence → evidence_submitted → under_bank_review → won / lost (terminal, IMMUTABLE) / expired (auto-loss) / accepted_refund (RDR path — Visa auto-refund). network IN {visa, mastercard, amex, discover, jcb, unionpay, diners, other} × reason_code catalogue (40+ codes). reason_category IN {fraud, authorization, processing_errors, consumer_disputes, card_recovery}. Sequential 'CBK-YYYY-00000001'. On lost/expired: 5-step finalization chain (2 offsetting transactions — disputed amount + network fee + invoice-disputed + clawback fan-out + marketing::ChargebackFiled negative-value + fraud signal). rdr_eligible (Visa RDR auto-refund, Medium+). ce3_eligible (Compelling Evidence 3.0, Visa fraud, Medium+). Rate monitoring (0.9% Visa VDMP / 1.5% Mastercard MDMP thresholds). 7y retention (10y Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasChargebackEvidence + Auditable + HasActivityLog + EncryptsSensitiveFields + SoftDeletes.

ccf_.description: Coach's held certifications — issuing_body, certification_name, level, issued_at, expires_at, verification_url, document_url_signed (HTTPS S3), verified_by_admin_user_id + verified_at. Level IN (entry / intermediate / advanced / expert / master, nullable). NotifyCertificationExpiringJob fires 90d/30d/7d before expires_at. Verification is async — some issuing bodies (USSF, NASM) have public APIs; others manual admin review. Composite unique (tenant_id, coaching_profile_id, issuing_body, certification_name, issued_at) partial. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToCoachingProfile + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

ccg_.description: Catalogue row for a consent category (essential / functional / marketing / analytics / ai-training / minor-parental). Platform defaults have tenant_id=null; tenant overrides shadow them.

cev_.description: Per-submission evidence bundle. IMMUTABLE at creation — resubmissions create new attempts with submission_attempt_number + 1. Composite unique (tenant_id, chargeback_id, submission_attempt_number). 8 evidence sections: invoice_evidence, receipt_evidence, service_documentation, refund_policy, communication_log, shipping_docs (nullable), customer_signature_evidence (SHA-256 device fingerprint), uncategorized_text. PCI-DSS Req 3.4 scan refuses PAN patterns. Optional ce3_bundle metadata for Compelling Evidence 3.0. Encrypted provider_response. NO SoftDeletes — 7y retention cascade from parent chargeback. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToChargeback + Auditable + EncryptsSensitiveFields.

cns_.description: Immutable subject x category x decision snapshot. Withdrawal writes a new row rather than mutating an existing one.

coa_.description: Staff-satellite adding per-sport coaching profile (specialization, certifications, rating, availability_pattern). One Coach per Staff at a time. Cascades everything through staff_id → branch.

cop_.description: Per-Staff satellite marking them as an active Coach with sport-specific expertise. NOT every Staff is a Coach — profile is opt-in via CoachingProfile row. Belongs to Tenant (CASCADE) + Staff (RESTRICT — one profile per Staff) + Branch (RESTRICT — primary branch) + optional primary_sport_id (sports_registry). Carries coaching_since_year, bio, photo_url_signed (HTTPS S3), availability jsonb (per-day-of-week time ranges), hourly_rate_cents (internal reference), specializations jsonb array, is_accepting_new_athletes, max_athletes_per_session, languages_spoken (ISO 639-1), verified_by_admin_at. Composite unique (tenant_id, staff_id) partial. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToStaff + BelongsToBranch + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

cpn_.description: Per-tenant discount code config. discount_type IN {percent, fixed_amount, free_period, first_month_free, bogo, free_shipping}. applicability IN {any, membership_only, specific_membership_plans, minimum_order_value}. Composite unique (tenant_id, code) partial WHERE deleted_at IS NULL AND valid_from <= NOW() AND (valid_until IS NULL OR valid_until >= NOW()) — one ACTIVE coupon per code. issuance_source IN {manual, referral, marketing_campaign, import, api}. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

crd_.description: Per-use redemption record. Composite unique (tenant_id, coupon_id, customer_type, customer_id, applied_to_type, applied_to_id) prevents double-redeem. Polymorphic customer (User / Athlete) + polymorphic applied_to (Membership / Invoice / Transaction). Frozen discount_snapshot jsonb at redemption. Atomic redemption via SELECT FOR UPDATE row lock. Immutable audit — no SoftDeletes. Distinct from rcd_ (ReferralCode, Wave 5 referrals). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToCoupon + Auditable.

crn_.description: Reversal invoice for refunds / adjustments / write-offs. IMMUTABLE after issuance. NO SoftDeletes — retained indefinitely (financial audit). Positive amount_cents (represents money OWED BACK to customer). Sequential credit_note_number per tenant per year (CN-YYYY-000001) via advisory lock. reason IN {refund, adjustment, write_off, duplicate, customer_dispute_resolved, accounting_correction}. status transitions draft → issued → applied (with applied_to polymorphic — refund / invoice / customer_balance). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToInvoice + Auditable + HasActivityLog.

csr_.description: Per-Coach per-Sport/Discipline/Position skill rating. rating_scale IN (stars_1_5 / level_5_stage — beginner/intermediate/advanced/expert/master). rating_value 1-5. Polymorphic ratable (Sport / Discipline / Position from sports_registry). Rated_by_user_id may not equal coach's user (self-rating forbidden). Default 2-year expiry (5y Enterprise). Admins use ratings to match-make athletes to appropriate coaches. Composite unique (tenant_id, coaching_profile_id, ratable_type, ratable_id) partial. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToCoachingProfile + MorphTo(ratable) + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

cup_.description: In-flight multipart / tus.io state row. State machine: initiating → uploading → finalizing → completed | aborted | expired.

delv_.description: Per-channel delivery attempt row for a Notification.

dep_.description: RFC 8594 Sunset workflow entry — announces upcoming API version removal.

dis_.description: Sport sub-variant / competition format (football_11v11, football_futsal, basketball_5v5, basketball_3x3, swimming_freestyle, swimming_relay). One Sport hasMany Disciplines. Slug IMMUTABLE post-create.

dlg_.description: Time-bounded delegation of a delegator's role(s) to a delegate in the same tenant. Max 90-day window.

dom_.description: Canonical hostname owned by a Tenant. State machine: pending -> verifying -> verified -> expired.

dpa_.description: Untimed same-day admission — branch-scoped POS record. Financial record: 7-year retention, NO soft-delete. Anonymous walk-in profile fields redacted 90 days post-consumption per GDPR Art. 5(1)(c).

drc_.description: DNS record inside a Domain. Diff-state, not lifecycle-tracked.

dsa_.description: Per-module contribution to a DSAR bundle. Points at a storage::File.

dsr_.description: Data-subject-access-request state machine (received -> triaging -> collecting -> assembling -> delivered | rejected).

efc_.description: Event ↔ Facility pivot attaching N facilities to one event. Enterprise-only for N>1 via event_multi_facility entitlement. Exactly one is_primary=true per event.

eve_.description: Sport competitive / social / educational event — tournament, match, showcase, workshop, camp, awards ceremony. Belongs to Tenant + Organization + optional Branch + optional Season. Multi-facility via event_facilities pivot.

evt_.description: Team's participation in an Event (Wave 3+). Records participation_type, registered_at, checked_in_at, result JSONB, attendance_count.

fac_.description: Bookable resource inside a Branch. Court / field / pool / studio / room / gym floor / lane. Availability + pricing + blackouts + capacity live as JSONB on the row.

fil_.description: Uploaded file record. Polymorphic via fileable_type/fileable_id. Content-addressable dedup via sha256 with per-blob refcount.

fvr_.description: Derived rendition of a File (thumbnail / medium / hero / pdf-thumbnail). One row per (file, variant_key).

gfc_.description: Immutable audit log of geofence evaluations.

hck_.description: Per-tenant health check configuration. check_type IN {db_ping, redis_ping, queue_depth, memory_usage, cpu_usage, disk_usage, http_endpoint, dns_lookup, tls_expiry, custom_script}. interval_seconds >= 15 (rate-limit floor). timeout_seconds <= interval. Encrypted target column (contains connection strings). Retained while active + 90d grace. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

hcr_.description: Append-only per-execution health check result. status IN {healthy, degraded, unhealthy, timeout, error}. Response body PII-redacted + truncated to 8KB. 7d hot / 30d cold retention (30d hot / 90d cold Enterprise via monitoring_extended_retention). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToHealthCheck. NO SoftDeletes — hard-purged via retention job.

idn_.description: Global credential record - one row per real human across every Application. Reachable ONLY through auth-service actions; never wire-projected.

imp_.description: PlatformUser act-as session against a tenant User. 60-min hard cap; append-only compliance evidence.

inv_.description: An invitation issued to a target_type + target_email tuple.

ivc_.description: The money-owed record. DISTINCT from `inv_` which is Invitations (auth module) — this uses `ivc_` to disambiguate. Belongs to Tenant. Polymorphic customer (User / Athlete / Organization). Optional membership_id + membership_renewal_id references. Sequential invoice_number per tenant per year (YYYY-000001 or SERIES-YYYY-000001) via Postgres advisory lock. Frozen billing_address + shipping_address + customer_tax_id + currency at issuance. status IN {draft, open, paid, partially_paid, void, uncollectible, pastdue, refunded, disputed, written_off}. Void FORBIDDEN post-payment — use credit note. 7y retention (10y Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasInvoiceLines + HasCreditNotes + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

ive_.description: Audit-funnel row: sent → delivered → opened → clicked → accepted/declined.

ivl_.description: Per-invoice line item. item_type IN {membership_charge, addon, setup_fee, late_fee, adjustment, one_time_service, tax_line, discount_line}. Draft-only mutation — post-finalize lines are immutable. quantity decimal 10,4 supports fractional (0.5 for half-hour). unit_price_cents may be negative only for discount_line/adjustment. Bankers' rounding on subtotal. Composite unique (tenant_id, invoice_id, line_number) contiguous 1..N. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToInvoice + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

lat_.description: Per-AttendanceRecord late-arrival satellite. Tracks WHEN in the grace-period an athlete arrived + which policy applied + what penalty was applied. minutes_late from session.starts_at. penalty_applied IN (none / consume_pass_anyway / fractional_consume / notify_only). Denormalises session_id + athlete_id from parent for query performance. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToAttendanceRecord + Auditable (no soft-delete — cascade with parent).

lhd_.description: Freezes retention on a subject / tenant / case / class scope. Requires two-person approval to apply.

lng_.description: Curated per-platform language row (BCP-47 tag + display metadata + is_beta flag).

mal_.description: Fired alert record. Linked to a MonitoringAlertPolicy + optionally grouped into a MonitoringIncident. status IN {firing, acknowledged, resolved, suppressed, expired}. severity IN {p1, p2, p3, p4}. 30d hot / 90d cold retention (90d hot / 1y cold Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToMonitoringAlertPolicy + BelongsToMonitoringIncident (nullable) + Auditable.

map_.description: Per-tenant threshold configuration. signal_type IN {health_check_status, error_rate, latency_p95, latency_p99, queue_depth, worker_health, custom_metric}. threshold_operator + threshold_value + window_seconds + consecutive_breaches_required. suppression_config supports after-hours + weekend + silenced_until. Retained while active + 90d grace. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

mbn_.description: APPEND-ONLY per-period billing audit. attempt_number 1..4 progression (retry ladder). status IN {pending, attempting, succeeded, failed_transient, failed_permanent, cancelled}. next_attempt_at computed from retry_config. Recomputes tax + coupon for NEW period (not membership's frozen snapshots). NO SoftDeletes — 7-year financial audit retention. Composed via HasPrefixedUlid + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToMembership + Auditable.

mbp_.description: The SKU catalog. Per-branch — plans NEVER cross branches. billing_interval IN {monthly, quarterly, annual, lifetime}. Optional trial_days (Medium+ via membership_trial_periods). passes_per_period + passes_carry_over. refund_policy IN {no_refund, prorated, full_within_grace, by_admin_approval} + refund_grace_days. Optional age_group_id restriction. max_active_members capacity cap + current_active_members running counter. Composite unique (tenant_id, branch_id, slug) partial. Composed via HasPrefixedUlid + HasSlug + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToBranch + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

mbr_.description: Customer's paid subscription contract with the academy. FUNDAMENTALLY DISTINCT from TenantSubscription (SaaS billing). Belongs to Tenant + Region + Branch + Athlete + MembershipPlan. Lifecycle: pending → active → paused → cancelled/lapsed/refunded/expired. Frozen price_snapshot_cents + coupon_snapshot + tax_calculation_snapshot at signing — plan price / VAT changes never retroactively re-price. Atomic invoice creation on create via CreateInvoiceOnMembershipCreated hook (same DB transaction). Renewal retry ladder: day+3 / day+7 / day+14 → lapsed after 3 failures. Cancellation: soft (period-end) vs hard (prorated refund, Enterprise). Composite unique (tenant_id, athlete_id, membership_plan_id) WHERE status IN (pending, active, paused). Composed via HasPrefixedUlid + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToRegion + BelongsToBranch + BelongsToAthlete + BelongsToMembershipPlan + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

mci_.description: Grouped alert timeline. Multiple related alerts within 5min window + same severity collapse into one incident. status IN {open, acknowledged, investigating, mitigating, resolved, postmortem}. Auto-resolves when last firing alert clears. P1 incident + resolved → dispatches MonitoringPostmortemRequiredNotification. 90d hot / 1y cold retention (indefinite Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasMonitoringAlerts + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

mdl_.description: Max-attempts-exceeded events for manual replay. Every fire is P1 — the event is a paid conversion signal that never reached the ad network. Reasons: max_attempts_exceeded / provider_permanent_failure / circuit_breaker_max_opens / invalid_payload / auth_failure. 7-year retention (financial audit). Replay + resolve workflow with ops audit trail.

mdv_.description: Per-provider-per-attempt delivery log. One row per (event × provider × attempt). Captures request payload (encrypted at rest), response, HTTP status, latency, error details, next_retry_at. 2-year retention (support debugging window). Suppression states: suppressed_by_consent / suppressed_by_circuit_breaker / suppressed_by_provider_off / rate_limited.

mev_.description: Canonical marketing event ledger. One row per captured business milestone (signup, trial_started, subscription_started, membership_purchased, athlete_enrolled, refund_issued, chargeback_filed, ...). Attribution + consent snapshotted at CREATE time (frozen). 7-year retention (financial audit). Immutable after terminal status. Composite unique (tenant_id, deduplication_key) prevents double-fire.

mfc_.description: Ephemeral in-flight MFA challenge. Shared ledger owned by identity/auth; schema documented in mfa module.

mpc_.description: Per-tenant provider config. One active row per (tenant, provider). Encrypted config jsonb (pixel_id, access_token, customer_id, api_secret, webhook_url, hmac_secret). Holds circuit-breaker state (consecutive_failure_count, circuit_breaker_open_until, reset_count), retry config (backoff schedule + max_attempts), rate-limit ceilings, test-mode flag + test_event_code. Nine providers: meta_capi, google_ads, google_analytics_4, gtm_server, tiktok_events, linkedin_insight, snapchat_capi, pinterest_capi, custom_webhook.

mpr_.description: Per-tenant per-provider connection. provider IN {sentry, datadog, pagerduty, opsgenie, prometheus, custom_webhook}. AES-256 encrypted config (DSN / API key / HMAC secret). enabled_severities filter subset of p1..p4. Circuit-breaker state + retry_config per row. Test-mode dispatches to provider sandbox. Retained while active + 90d grace after soft-delete. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + SoftDeletes. Distinct from mpc_ (MarketingProviderConfig, Wave 5) — different consent tier + retention.

nlc_.description: Send event combining an Issue + Audience + scheduled_at.

nli_.description: One issue of a Newsletter (editorial content + subject).

not_.description: The universal delivery record — one row per (recipient, category, template, dispatch).
not_.note: `not_` reads naturally as the abbreviation for `notification` in the ULID context; SQL keyword collision is not a concern because ULID values are always quoted strings.

org_.description: Structural sub-brand belonging to a Tenant. Nested via parent_id self-FK + materialised tree_path (sentinel-wrapped `.a.b.c.`). Every tenant provisions exactly one is_default=true Organization on TenantProvisioned. Enterprise tier gates nesting via `organization_hierarchy` entitlement.

pas_.description: Credit + eligibility record binding Membership (Wave 4) to Facility access. Credits decrement atomically on booking-create via SELECT ... FOR UPDATE.

pay_.description: Successful capture record. IMMUTABLE after create except amount_refunded_cents + amount_disputed_cents + transaction_id (recorded atomically). Belongs to Tenant + Invoice + PaymentIntent (unique 1:1). NEVER carries card PAN/CVV/magnetic-stripe (PCI-DSS Level 1). payment_method_last4 exactly 4 digits. device_fingerprint_hash SHA-256. three_ds_result IN {not_attempted, authenticated, rejected, not_supported, bypassed}. Fires atomic 3-step side effect chain on create: TransactionRecorder.record + Invoice.mark_paid + growth::marketing::CaptureMembershipPurchasedMarketingEvent. 7y retention (10y Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToInvoice + BelongsToPaymentIntent + BelongsToPaymentMethod + HasPaymentDisputes + Auditable + HasActivityLog.

pdi_.description: Tenant-visible pre-chargeback lifecycle. State machine: warning_needs_response → warning_under_review → warning_closed (terminal); needs_response → under_review → won / lost / charge_refunded (terminal). Warning states = provider early-warning (funds not yet withdrawn). Full states = funds provisionally withdrawn. On lost: dispatches EscalateDisputeToChargebackJob → creates Chargeback (cbk_). On accept: creates Refund (rfd_) via /accept path. Evidence encrypted at rest. 7y retention (10y Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToPayment + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

per_.description: Spatie-extended permission row. Dot-notated names with scope suffix.

pit_.description: In-flight payment intent object. AES-256 encrypted client_secret + provider_reference_id at rest. State machine: initialized → requires_action → requires_confirmation → requires_capture → succeeded (terminal) / cancelled (terminal) / failed (terminal). 3DS2 step-up via next_action_type IN {redirect_to_url, use_stripe_sdk, three_d_secure_redirect, verify_with_micro_deposits, oxxo_display_details}. Atomic Payment.create on transition → succeeded (same DB txn). 90d retention (transient state). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToInvoice + BelongsToPaymentMethod + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

pln_.description: Per-Application plan definition (maps to Stripe Price or Paddle Product).

plp_.description: 1:1 PII satellite of PlatformUser (name, phone, avatar, Slack + GitHub handles, timezone). HR-controlled fields immutable.

plu_.description: Academorix-staff principal on the `platform_admin` guard. Cross-tenant + cross-application by construction.

pmt_.description: Saved payment token. NEVER card PAN/CVV — provider-scoped tokens only (pm_..., etc.). AES-256 encrypted provider_reference_id. Deduplicated per customer via SHA-256 fingerprint_hash — duplicate detected → re-activate existing. Polymorphic customer (User / Athlete). method_type IN {card, bank_debit, bank_transfer, wallet, installment}. Bank_debit requires verified_at (micro-deposit verification). SoftDeletes with 90d grace + provider-side detach. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

pos_.description: Sport-specific role / position (football_goalkeeper, football_defender, basketball_point_guard, basketball_center, swimming_freestyler). One Discipline hasMany Positions. Slug IMMUTABLE post-create.

prf_.description: 1:1 PII satellite of User (name, phone, avatar, locale, timezone).

pss_.description: Per-session admission credit. pass_type IN {standard, trial, bonus, carryover, event, promotional}. valid_from/valid_until time bounds. consumed_at + consumed_by_session_id polymorphic session ref (Wave 3+ sessions). Idempotent consumption — refuses when already consumed OR outside valid window OR parent membership paused. refunded_at (admin override — pass returns to available). Composed via HasPrefixedUlid + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToMembership + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

psub_.description: Active subscription binding a tenant to a Plan.

rcd_.description: Referral code entry. code_type: user_scoped (per-user, generated on account activation) / campaign (admin-picked, e.g. SUMMER25) / opaque (random). Usage caps + expiry + is_active. Composite unique (tenant, code) among non-deleted rows.

rdf_.description: Academorix metadata layer for system roles - business_type default provisioning, i18n labels, min-tier gating.

ref_.description: Tracked referrer × referred × program × code instance. Captures attribution_snapshot from growth::attribution + device_snapshot (SHA-256 hashes only) at claim time. Fraud score 0..100 from FraudDetector. State machine: pending_claim → claimed → signed_up → trigger_pending → vesting → vested → rewarded, with cancelled / expired / fraudulent branch outs. Composite unique (tenant, program, referrer, referred) prevents double-referral.

reg_.description: Commercial + regulatory zone belonging to a Tenant. Currency + timezone + locale + tax_config + weekend_days. Orthogonal to Organization; they meet at Branch. Every tenant provisions exactly one is_default=true Region on TenantProvisioned.

rfd_.description: Merchant-initiated money-out. Complementary to Payment (money-in). State machine: pending → awaiting_approval → approved → processing → succeeded (terminal, IMMUTABLE) / failed / cancelled / provider_error / rejected. reason IN {customer_requested, product_not_received, product_unacceptable, duplicate_charge, fraud_confirmed, subscription_cancelled, admin_correction, chargeback_prevention, regulator_required, accounting_correction}. refund_type IN {full, partial, prorated}. refunded_to IN {original_payment_method, customer_balance, bank_transfer, check}. Approval gated by amount/staleness thresholds + always-approve reasons. Segregation of duties enforced (approver ≠ initiator). Sequential 'REF-YYYY-00000001' per tenant per year. On succeeded: 5-step finalization chain (TransactionRecorder offset + CreditNoteIssuer + InvoiceStateUpdater + ClawbackCoordinator + marketing::RefundIssued negative-value). 7y retention (10y Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasRefundLines + Auditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

rfl_.description: Per-invoice-line partial refund detail. Freezes proration_config jsonb for period-based refunds (unused_period + pass_credit). Composite unique (tenant_id, refund_id, invoice_line_id). SUM of refund_lines.amount_cents == parent refund.amount_cents (observer invariant). billing_interval IN {daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, annual, one_time}. IMMUTABLE post-create — corrections require cancelling parent refund + new. NO SoftDeletes — cascade delete via parent refund purge only. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToRefund + Auditable.

rfr_.description: Rule-based fraud detection finding. flag_type: self_ip_match / device_fingerprint_match / disposable_email / self_email_variant / velocity_exceeded / click_storm_pattern / blacklist_domain / geographic_mismatch / behavioral_anomaly. Severity (warn / block / critical) + confidence (0..100) + supporting evidence jsonb. Review workflow: unreviewed → confirmed_fraud / false_positive / manual_override_approved. 7-year retention.

rol_.description: Spatie-extended role row with (application_id, tenant_id, is_system, description, sort_order).

rpg_.description: Per-tenant referral program config. Reward type (percent_discount / fixed_amount / free_months / free_sessions / credits / point_award) × amount × currency, single_sided or double_sided, trigger_event, vesting_rule (immediate / trigger_plus_hold_days / after_refund_window_closes / n_events_completed / manual_approval), fraud_config, eligibility_config, program budget caps. Program state: draft → active → paused → archived.

rrw_.description: Per-referral reward record. One row per recipient_role (referrer / referred) per referral. Vesting timeline (vesting_starts_at → vesting_completes_at → materialized_at → paid_at). Materializes as Finance credits (Wave 4 finance module). Clawback on refund / chargeback / fraud / program_archived reverses paid rewards. 7-year retention (tax audit — issued rewards over IRS threshold require 1099 reporting).

rtr_.description: Audit trail of a single retention sweep (per tenant, per invocation).

sae_.description: Synonym / alias entry for a search index.

sat_.description: Session ↔ Athlete pivot with attendance state (registered / checked_in / absent / late / excused). One athlete attends a session once.

sea_.description: Time-bounded competition/training cycle. Lifecycle planned → registration_open → in_progress → playoffs → completed → archived. Belongs to Tenant + Organization (optional) + Branch (optional) with an optional sport_key for sport-scoped seasons. Exactly one is_current=true per scoping tuple.

ses_.description: A single practice / lesson / class instance. Composes facility::ResourceBooking for the physical slot. Adds coach, session_type, curriculum, attendance tracking, safeguarding-incident chain.

set_.description: Persisted value for a (owner, group_key, name) tuple.

sev_.description: Vector embedding entry for semantic search.

sfi_.description: Minor-safeguarding report inbox entry. Severity-driven escalation SLAs.

sidx_.description: Definition of a searchable index (target model + fields).

sopt_.description: Per-index tuning options (ranking rules, stop words).

spo_.description: Top-level sport catalog entry (football, basketball, swimming, yoga, tennis, general_fitness, ...). tenant_id NULL = platform-scoped; non-null = tenant custom. Slug IMMUTABLE post-create — downstream Wave 3 modules reference by string.

spr_.description: Versioned VPC / DPA registry entry - every third party that processes subject data.

sq_.description: Query audit row for search analytics.
sq_.note: 2 chars — below the min-3 rule; grandfathered until refactor. Rename target: `sqa_` (SearchQueryAudit).

ssync_.description: Per-index sync state (last full index, incremental cursor).
ssync_.note: 5 chars — breaks the max-4 rule; grandfathered until refactor. Rename target: `sst_` (SearchSyncState) once the schema is v2.

stf_.description: Employment record wrapping a User row with employment metadata (position, department, employment_type, employment_status, compensation, emergency contact). Belongs to Tenant + Branch + User (RESTRICT). Compensation is regulated-financial tier with 7-year retention.

sua_.description: Per-issuance signed-URL audit row. High-volume; 90-day hard-purge retention. signature_hash unique for redemption lookup.

sub_.description: Legacy alias for `psub_` — grandfathered from v0.1.

supp_.description: Add-on line attached to a subscription.

svc_.description: Machine credential for inter-service authentication. Bound to one Application via application_id; optionally tenant-scoped.

tea_.description: Group of humans practicing/playing/attending under a Branch. Sport-agnostic — squad / class / cohort / group / crew. Belongs to Tenant + Organization + Branch. Optional Season + AgeGroup (Wave 3 FKs, nullable pre-Wave-3).

ten_.description: Tenant row. Belongs to an Application.

thm_.description: Per-tenant active theme record. Carries selected_preset_id + immutable tokens_snapshot (frozen at activation) + mode (light/dark) + accessibility_flags (high_contrast/reduced_motion/larger_text/focus_visible_always). Composite partial unique on (tenant_id, mode) WHERE is_active = true — exactly one active theme per (tenant, mode). Tokens_snapshot materialised from preset + overrides cascade at activation; IMMUTABLE thereafter (rollback creates a new Theme row). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasThemeSnapshot + HasUserstamps + HasAuditable + HasActivityLog + SoftDeletes.

tld_.description: Double-entry line item. Debit XOR credit per row (DB CHECK + observer). SUM(debits) == SUM(credits) per transaction (load-bearing invariant). account IN 14-entry chart-of-accounts (revenue, accounts_receivable, cash, refunds_owed, refunds_expense, tax_payable, gateway_fees, bank_deposits, write_offs, coupons_expense, chargebacks_expense, accounts_payable, prepayments, deferred_revenue). account_currency matches parent transaction.currency EXCEPT for currency_conversion (mixed-currency invariant exception). IMMUTABLE post-create. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToTransaction + Auditable.

tmb_.description: Row that pins a User to a Tenant with a Role. Multi-tenant membership pivot.

tpl_.description: Versioned reusable template (one row per locale + version).

tps_.description: Pre-built theme configuration. tenant_id NULL for platform-provided presets (6 seeded day-1: light-default, dark-default, high-contrast-light, high-contrast-dark, brand-forward-blue, brand-forward-green); non-null for tenant-authored custom presets. Complete token map in tokens jsonb — every key from canonical vocabulary. Category IN (platform_default / tenant_custom / brand_forward / high_contrast / minimal). Composite unique on (COALESCE(tenant_id, 'platform'), slug) — platform and tenant namespaces never collide. Composed via HasUlids + HasSlug + BelongsToTenant (nullable) + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

trm_.description: Polymorphic roster row — points at Athlete / Coach / Staff / User via (member_type, member_id). Partial unique per (team, member_type, member_id) WHERE status=active.

trn_.description: UI-string translation row keyed on (tenant_id?, namespace, group, key, locale).

trx_.description: The money-movement ledger root. One row per business-level money movement. IMMUTABLE after status='posted'. kind IN {invoice_payment, refund_issued, chargeback_debit, coupon_credit, tax_remittance, fee_charge, adjustment, write_off, bank_deposit, bank_withdrawal, currency_conversion, opening_balance}. Reversal via NEW offsetting transaction (source_transaction_id + reversal_reason). Sequential transaction_number 'TXN-YYYY-NNNNNNNN' per (tenant, year) via advisory lock. Cross-currency freezes exchange_rate_to_base + base_amount_cents (IAS 21). NO SoftDeletes — 7y financial audit (10y Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + HasLedgerEntries + Auditable + HasActivityLog.

tto_.description: Per-tenant sparse patch on top of a preset. One row per (theme_id, token_key). Enables per-token brand customisation without cloning the whole preset. token_type IN (color / dimension / typography / radius / shadow / motion / opacity / z_index) determines the value schema. Cascade-deletes with parent theme. Composite unique on (tenant_id, theme_id, token_key). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + BelongsToTheme + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

ttr_.description: Probationary tryout for a prospective team member. Polymorphic trialist (athlete / user / anonymous). Atomically convertible to a TeamMember row.

txc_.description: Immutable per-invoice-line tax computation audit trail. Freezes tax_rate_snapshot + exemption_applied (jsonb) at commit — tax rate changes after invoice issuance never retroactively re-tax historical invoices. provider IN {taxjar, avalara, stripe_tax, native_calculator, custom_webhook}. Referenced by finance::invoice.tax_calculation_id (RESTRICT) + finance::membership.tax_calculation_id. NO SoftDeletes — hard-purge FORBIDDEN inside the module; migrates to tax_calculations_archive on 7y (10y Enterprise). Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable.

txe_.description: Per-tenant exemption certificate. exemption_type IN {reseller, non_profit, diplomatic, rural, religious, educational, government, medical, disability}. Polymorphic customer (User / Athlete / Organization). Encrypted certificate_document_url (S3 signed). verification_status IN {pending, verified, rejected, expired} with async cross-check against issuing jurisdiction's public registry. 7-year retention post-expiry. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

txj_.description: Country/state/city rule catalog. tenant_id nullable — null = platform-wide reference data; non-null = tenant custom (requires tax_jurisdiction_custom Enterprise entitlement). tax_type IN {vat, gst, sales_tax, consumption_tax, digital_services_tax}. nexus_type IN {physical, economic, marketplace} for US sales-tax nexus. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

txr_.description: Per-jurisdiction tax rate row with effective_from/effective_to time bounds — supports VAT changes at fiscal-year boundaries. rate_type IN {vat, gst, sales_tax, consumption_tax, digital_services_tax, withholding_tax, stamp_duty, customs, other}. percentage as decimal 5,4 (0.2000 = 20%). is_inclusive vs additive. source IN {manual, provider_synced, import, migration}. Composed via HasUlids + BelongsToTenant + Auditable + SoftDeletes.

use_.description: Audit row for a consume() call.

usr_.description: Per-Application projection of an Identity. Unique on (identity_id, application_id).

wac_.description: FIDO2 credential (platform authenticator or roaming hardware key). Global aggregate - belongs to Identity.

wit_.description: Third-party integration credentials per Tenant. Config encrypted at rest.

wsub_.description: Customer-registered inbound URL + destination + event list.

xart_.description: Import / export artifact file reference (CSV, XLSX, JSON).

ads_.description: Typed field: code, type (integer/decimal/select/boolean/date/text/slider/percentage), widget hints, validation, bilingual labels, deprecation flag. Immutable code. Delete refused when referenced by any AttributeSet.

asg_.description: Versioned collection of AttributeDefinitions for (entity_type, discriminator_value). One active set per (entity_type, discriminator_value) via partial unique. Historic values render via captured version_snapshot on host.

atg_.description: Visual grouping within an AttributeSet (Primary Stats / Position / Physical Profile). code unique per (tenant, set). Cascade delete with parent set.

bch_.description: Registered WebSocket channel via Reverb — namespace + type (public/private/presence) + authorization callback FQCN. Composite unique (tenant_id, namespace). Discovered via #[AsBroadcastChannel] scan.

bsn_.description: Active subscription of a User to a BroadcastChannel. State: pending_auth then active then disconnected. Auto-purge on disconnected + last_seen_at > 15m.

prs_.description: Ephemeral row per (channel, user) tracking who's online. Redis-backed with periodic snapshot. Purged 15m after last heartbeat.

pin_.description: CENTRAL-PLANE global identity carrying the Academorix ID (AX-XXXX-XXXX). Cross-academy shared profile substrate (blueprint 2.2). NO tenant_id — central connection. Minimal PII. Tenant Athletes + Staff optionally reference via person_identity_id.

pgl_.description: CENTRAL-PLANE guardian to minor link on the global identity. Cross-tenant shape so a parent identity is portable. Consent-gated.

tlr_.description: Consent-gated request from a tenant to link a local Athlete/Staff to a global PersonIdentity. State: requested then approved / declined then revoked. Enumeration-resistant lookup (ID + DOB required; no PII revealed pre-consent).

pra_.description: Attribute-driven skill assessment per athlete_enrollment plus capture_date. values JSONB validated against ActiveAttributeSet (frozen at assessment via attribute_set_snapshot_id). Overall score computed via sport-config weighting to tier (bronze/silver/gold/diamond).

pcd_.description: Snapshot render of a ProgressAssessment as a shareable card. Card_type: fifa_card / attribute_card / radar / time_trial / apparatus_scores (per sport-config). Public shareable via signed URL.

cno_.description: Coach observation on an athlete_enrollment. visibility: coach_only / shared_with_parent / shared_with_athlete. Immutable audit trail — edits create new revisions.

blt_.description: Martial-arts belt ordering per sport_key (karate white to black 5dan, judo, taekwondo). Ordered progression. Referenced by grading events.

gre_.description: Belt-grading examination event (martial arts) — date + venue + examiner_coach_id + candidates (via GradingResult). Distinct from Session (this is a formal exam, not practice).

grr_.description: Per-athlete outcome at a GradingEvent — from_belt_id + to_belt_id + result (pass/fail/deferred) + examiner_notes.

ptb_.description: Named collection of PerformanceTests (e.g. U12 Football Physical Q1 — 40m sprint + VO2 + vertical jump). Per sport_key. Versioned like attribute sets.

ptt_.description: A single physical test definition — name / unit / better_direction (higher/lower) / age_bands. Reusable across batteries.

ptr_.description: One athlete_enrollment test outcome — captured_at + value + tester_user_id. metrics JSONB validated against active AttributeSet if attribute-driven. Percentile computed vs Benchmark.

bmk_.description: Age-band + sport_key + test percentile reference (p10/p25/p50/p75/p90). Tenant-configurable but seeded from research defaults.

mrc_.description: Root health record per athlete. Extremely restricted RBAC (medical role only). Composed via encrypted fields.

inj_.description: Injury event — body_part / mechanism / severity / onset_at / status (reported/under_treatment/recovering/cleared). Return-to-play gate consumed by matches.

trt_.description: Treatment record linked to an Injury — provider / date / notes / follow_up_at. Encrypted at rest.

mcl_.description: Clearance certificate — issued_by_user + issued_at + expires_at + scope (all_activities / limited / pending_review). Eligibility gate: blocks squad selection when expired or injury active.

alg_.description: Allergy record — allergen / severity / notes / reported_by. Surfaced to coaches via allergy-summary read (not raw details).

med_.description: Active medication record — name / dosage / frequency / prescribing_provider / expires_at. Restricted to medical role + admin.

bgc_.description: Staff DBS / clearance record — type (DBS enhanced / DBS basic / state-BCI / SafeSport / custom) / status (pending/verified/expired) / issued_at + expires_at + verification_url. Block-assignment gate in coaching/team.

pak_.description: Staff acknowledged safeguarding policy X on date Y. Audit-material — never mutable. Refresh cadence per policy_version.

dvp_.description: Named talent pathway — Foundation to Youth Development to Youth Team to Senior. Sport-scoped.

dvs_.description: A stage in a DevelopmentPathway — promotion_criteria JSONB validated against active AttributeSet. Ordered progression.

sct_.description: Coach/scout observation on a trialist or existing athlete — narrative + rating + tags. Distinct from ProgressAssessment (that is the structured attribute-driven view).

tfg_.description: Talent identification signal — flagged_by_user + reason + flagged_at. Feeds pathway promotion queue.

gol_.description: Individual Development Plan goal — description + target_date + status (open/achieved/deferred/dropped). Reviewable each term.

cmp_.description: League / knockout tournament root — season + status + scoring_strategy (from sport registry). Round-robin or bracket format.

cmt_.description: Team registration in a Competition. seed + registration_status. Feeds standings + bracket.

cmf_.description: Scheduled matchup — realized via sports/event. round_number + bracket_position. Standings recompute triggered on fixture result.

std_.description: Denormalised league table row — team_id + games_played + wins + draws + losses + goals_for + goals_against + points. Recomputed on result.

bkt_.description: Knockout tournament bracket node — round + position + participant refs + winner_advances_to_node_id.

frm_.description: Named formation template — 4-3-3, 4-4-2, basketball zone, tennis singles/doubles. Sport-scoped. Slot count validates vs sport team size.

fsl_.description: Individual slot in a formation — position (kebab-case) + x/y coordinates (0-100 for field render). Ordered.

dri_.description: Coaching drill — objective / age_band / duration / equipment / difficulty / diagram_url / coaching_points. Sport-scoped via sport_key. Search-indexed.

dcg_.description: Drill categorization — passing / shooting / defense / conditioning. Tenant-authorable.

spl_.description: Ordered collection of drills for a training session — sport + duration + objective + optional curriculum_week_id linkage.

spi_.description: Drill entry in a plan — drill_id + duration + notes + sort_order.

cur_.description: Multi-week structured plan for a Team+Season — 6-16 weeks. Cloneable across seasons.

cwk_.description: Weekly slot in a Curriculum with linked SessionPlans + learning objectives.

psq_.description: 1:1 coaching request — athlete + coach + preferred slots. State: requested then approved then scheduled then completed / no_show / cancelled.

scr_.description: Session-pack credit ledger — parent bought 10-pack; each private-session consume decrements. Atomic consume in same transaction.

cnl_.description: NFC/RFID wristband or QR card registered to a member — UID (MIFARE/NTAG) + holder polymorphic (Athlete/Staff). Status: issued then active then lost/revoked then replaced.

gte_.description: NFC/RFID reader/gate at a branch — label + branch_id + last_heartbeat_at.

chl_.description: Raw check-in event — UID + gate_id + timestamp. Debounced (2s repeat suppression). Feeds attendance ingest.

exp_.description: Money-out record — category + amount + currency + is_recurring + recurrence + receipt_document_id. State: draft then approved then paid.

exc_.description: Tenant expense category — rent / utilities / equipment / maintenance / salaries / marketing / other. Ordered display.

plr_.description: Periodic payroll job — computes staff pay from delivered sessions + bonuses + hourly. State: draft then approved then paid.

pll_.description: Per-staff line in a PayrollRun — staff_id + gross + deductions + net + branch_allocations (JSONB when multi-branch).

bdg_.description: Per-branch or per-category budget — period + amount + used_amount + variance.

ctr_.description: Optional cost-center grouping for expense analytics — code + name.

ann_.description: Academy-wide (or scoped) news item — audience_scope (tenant/org/branch/team/role) + publish_at + expires_at + rich_content. State: draft then scheduled then published then expired.

anv_.description: Per-user view record — read_at + acknowledged_at. Enables audience delivery metrics.

cnv_.description: 1:1 or group thread — scope (branch/team/adhoc) + subject + last_message_at. Retention per tenant policy.

cvp_.description: User in a Conversation with per-user state — muted_until + last_read_at.

msg_.description: Single message in a Conversation — body / attachments / sent_at / read_by (jsonb of user_id to read_at).

rpt_.description: Cross-module analytics definition — kind (attendance/revenue/retention/roster) + parameters + refresh_cadence + audience_scope.

svr_.description: User-saved parameterization of a ReportDefinition — includes filters + column selection + delivery schedule.

rre_.description: One materialized output — output_document_id + rows_count + run_started/completed. Retention 90d unless attached to a Dashboard.

dsh_.description: Widget-composed dashboard — role-scoped + layout JSONB. Widgets reference SavedReports.

rvs_.description: Walk-in visitor record — visitor name + purpose + expected_end_at + host_user_id + check-in/out timestamps. Wristband issued via credentials linkage.

wpp_.description: Apple Wallet / Google Wallet pass issued to a membership holder — serial + kind (membership_card / event_ticket) + status (issued/updated/revoked). Auto-updates on renewal.

awd_.description: Recognition instance granted to an athlete — type + granted_at + evidence (event/attendance/etc). Auto-grant rules subscribe to domain events.

crt_.description: PDF certificate rendered for an Award — signed URL + branded template + issued_to + issued_at.

pge_.description: Tenant public page — slug + title + content_blocks[] + SEO metadata. Route-mounted on public tenant site.

syc_.description: Per-device per-entity high-water-mark cursor for offline sync. Ephemeral 30-day rolling.

aic_.description: Tenant-scoped metadata wrapper over the vendor `agent_conversations` table owned by laravel/ai (Conversational + RememberConversation). Adds tenant_id + persona + cost totals for admin visibility. The vendor table owns the message history; this row owns the tenant/audit envelope.

arv_.description: Single model invocation — model / tokens_in / tokens_out / latency_ms / cost_minor. Audit trail per conversation.

atc_.description: Individual tool invocation inside an AiRun — tool_name + args_hash + result_summary + ms + error?

aie_.description: Vector embedding for RAG search — source_type + source_id + vector. Tenant-namespaced.

cnb_.description: Reusable content block on a PublicPage — kind (hero/text/gallery/cta) + payload + order.

adc_.description: Per-tenant admin dashboard configuration — enabled_widgets + layout + recent_actions cache.

adr_.description: Draft-then-confirm envelope for WriteMode::Draft tool invocations. status IN open/confirmed/expired/discarded (DraftStatus enum). Every WritableTool.handle() locks writes into an AiDraft; POST /ai/drafts/{id}/confirm applies the pending change after human review. action_payload IMMUTABLE post-create.

evi_.description: Invitation for an athlete or user to attend a scheduled activity (Event / Session / Match / Training). Polymorphic on (event_type + event_id). Composite unique (tenant_id, event_type, event_id, athlete_id). Consumed by attendance pre-fill: confirmed invitations become the expected roster on the session/match. Cascade delete when the parent activity is cancelled.

rsv_.description: RSVP response on an EventInvitation. Status IN pending / confirmed / declined / cancelled with optional note. State machine: pending → confirmed / declined; confirmed → cancelled (with reason, frees slot); declined → confirmed (changed mind). One RSVP per invitation via partial unique.

ern_.description: Throttled reminder log — records that a reminder was dispatched for an invitation, prevents double-fire within 24h. Kinds: first_reminder / final_reminder / chase / cancelled_slot_freed.

csb_.description: Per-user calendar feed subscription (iCal / ICS). Generates a signed feed URL that filters events by the user (their invitations + their athletes invitations for guardians). Regenerated on token rotation.

srg_.description: Sales / enrollment funnel record — state LEAD → CONTACTED → TRIAL → OFFERED → ENROLLED with side-branches WAITLISTED / DECLINED / EXPIRED. Converts to an athlete + athlete-enrollment + invoice on ENROLLED terminal. Distinct from access/invitations (auth invites) and crm-leads (marketing pipeline).

trb_.description: Trial (taster) session booked as part of a Registration. References a facility slot + coach. On attend → transition Registration to CONTACTED → OFFER path; on no-show → Registration stays at TRIAL for follow-up.

wle_.description: Position-ordered waitlist entry when a Team + Season combo is at capacity. Monotonic position within (tenant, season, team). Auto-offer on capacity free via AutoOfferOnCapacityFreedJob.

off_.description: Time-boxed offer created when a Registration reaches OFFERED (either directly or via waitlist auto-offer). expires_at + auto_decline_on_expire. On accept → creates athlete + athlete-enrollment + invoice atomically. On expire → transition Registration to EXPIRED + trigger next in line.

ract_.description: Per-Registration activity log entry (call / email / sms / note / visit / stage_change / offer_* / auto_reminder). Actor + occurred_at + body + context JSONB. Feeds funnel timeline UI + reporting dashboards. Immutable body post-create — append-only timeline.

rtsk_.description: Follow-up task on a Registration. Assignee + due_at + status (open / done / cancelled). AlertOverdueTasksJob fires notifications throttled to 1/24h. `overdue` is a computed view (open + due_at < NOW), not a stored state.

fom_.description: Root form definition. One per tenant purpose (season registration, waiver update, medical questionnaire). Latest published FormVersion is what renders publicly.

fmv_.description: Immutable snapshot of a Form schema at a point in time. Field definitions, validation rules, conditional logic, i18n label bundles. Version-locked once a submission exists against it.

fms_.description: One completed submission of a FormVersion. Answers JSONB (validated against the version schema). Signed session URL for save-and-resume. Handoff target module + entity FK (e.g. registrations::Registration) when the form is bound to a domain flow.

ipd_.description: Allowlist catalog of every provider Academorix supports (stripe / paddle / pipedrive / hubspot / twilio / zoom / apple_wallet / google_wallet / etc). System rows only — added via #[AsIntegrationProvider] discovery + upsert seeder. Adding a provider is a code deploy.

apk_.description: Marketplace app schema (Lane 2). OAuth 2.0 client + allowed scopes + webhook events + optional admin UI iframe. Schema lands day-one for future marketplace; no third-party accepted until compliance + review process ships. See ADR 0025.

ain_.description: Per-(tenant, app) install grant. Granted scopes (subset of App.allowed_scopes the tenant approved) + OAuth access-token hash. Uninstall soft-deletes.

awh_.description: Per-install webhook subscription. Event name + endpoint URL + signing-secret hash. Enabled flag for soft disable.

renaming_history.reason: Length reduction; frees `bra_` for future use.
Length reduction + entity-qualifying prefix (TenantContact vs generic `contact_` which is too broad).
Entity-qualifying (TenantIntegration vs generic `intg`); frees `int_` for potential future use.
Length reduction. `not_` in the ULID context is unambiguous — SQL parses ULID values as strings, never as boolean operators.
Wave 1 identity module User schema now landed; prefix promoted from reserved_for_future to active.

checks: Every keyPrefix in x-eloquent maps to an entry here.
Every JSON Schema `pattern` matches the format `^<prefix>[0-9A-HJKMNP-TV-Z]{26}$`.
No two entities share a prefix.
Renamed prefixes have a `renamed_from` field for traceability.
